verses.text: Tu-in mipa in ama zi Eve luppih a, amah gai-in Kain nei a, “ Topa' huhna tawh mi khat ka ngah khin hi,” ci hi
Tua ciangin a sanggampa Abel nei leuleu hi. Tu-in Abel, tuu kempa hi a, Kain, lo khopa ahi hi
Tua hun sungin Kain in lei pana piang gah piakna Topa' tungah paipih a
Abel in a tuuhon tacilte leh a sa limcite paipih hi. Topa in Abel leh ama piakna thusim a
ahih hangin Kain leh ama piakna thusim lo hi. Tua ahih ciangin Kain heh mahmah a, a mai sia hi
Topa in Kain tungah, “Bang hangin nang heh a, bang hangin na mai sia ahi hiam

Limtakin hih lecin, nang hong kisanglo ding ahi hiam? Limtakin na hih kei leh nang hong hih nuamin mawhna in hong buk a, nang hong uk nuam hi. Ahih hangin nang in tua mawhna na zawh ding ahi hi,” a ci hi
Kain in a sanggampa Abel kiangah, “Gamlakah vak ni,” ci hi. Amaute gamlakah a om ciangin Kain in a sanggampa Abel a that hi
Tua ciangin Topa in Kain tungah, “Na sanggampa Abel koi-ah om ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Ka thei kei hi. Kei, ka sanggam a kempa ka hi hiam?” ci hi
Topa in, “Bang hangin hici gamtat na hi hiam? Na sanggampa' sisan, leilak panin kei tungah hong kiko hi
Na sanggampa' sisan a hup dingin a kam a ka leitang tungah tu-in nang hong kisamsiat hi
Lo na khawh ciangin nang-a' dingin an hong piangsak nawnlo ding hi. Nang pen a galtai, leitunga a vakvai na hi ding hi,” a ci hi
Kain in Topa' tungah, “Keimah gim hong kipiakna, ka thuak zawh ding hilo hi

En in, tuni-in nangmah in leitung panin kei nong hawlkhia a, nang kiang panin kei nong notkhia hi. Kei pen a galtai, leitungah a vakvai ka hi ding a, kei hong mu peuhmah in hong that ding hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Topa in ama kiangah, “Tua bang hilo ding hi. Khatpeuh in Kain a thah leh tuapa tungah a zah sagihin kithuk ding hi,” a ci hi. Amah a tuakpeuh in a thahkhak lohna dingin Topa in Kain' tungah ciamtehna khat a koih hi
Tua ciangin Topa' omna panin Kain paikhia-in Eden nisuahna lam Nod gam sungah a teng hi.
Kain in a zi luppih a, amah gai-in Enok a nei hi. Kain in khuapi khat sat a, tua khuapi min dingin ama tapa' min tamin Enok a phuak hi
Enok sung panin Irad suak a, Irad pen Mehujael' pa ahi hi. Mehujael pen Methushael' pa hi a, Methushael pen Lamek' pa ahi hi
Lamek in zi nih nei hi. A khat' min Adah hi a, adang khat' min Zillah ahi hi
Adah in tapa Jabal nei hi. Amah pen puanbukte sungah tengin ganhing a neite' pian'na pupi ahi hi
A sanggampa' min Jubal hi a, laia lasakna leh tamngai tumte khempeuh' pian'na pupi ahi hi
Zillah in Tubalkain nei a, sumngo leh sik nazat khempeuh a bawlte' pian'na pupi ahi hi. Tubalkain' sanggamnu pen Naamah ahi hi
Lamek in a zite kiangah, “Adah leh Zillah aw, ka aw ngai un. Lamek' zite aw, ka thugen ngai un. Kei hong liamsak manin mi khat, kei hong sat manin khanglai mi khat ka that khin hi
Kain a kithah manin a zah sagihin kithukkik ahih leh, Lamek a kithah manin a zah sawmsagihin kithukkik taktak ding hi,” a ci hi.

Adam in a zi luppih leuleu hi. Amah in tapa khat nei a, a min Seth ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh, “Kain in Abel that ahih manin Abel' tangin Pasian in kei-a' dingin naupang khat hong sehsak hi,” amah in ci hi
Seth in zong tapa khat nei a, ama min Enosh ci hi. Tua huna kipanin mite in Topa bia-in a min lawh ding kipan ta uh hi.
